notes: 7G8 item 6. Counts as its own family per the catalog (rules diverge completely from plain ttt: py engine+bot / go TCP / asm evaluator untouched). Transcripts generated by randomized backtracking DFS over an independent Python rules oracle with per-player allowed-sub-win filters: macro-win game closes ONLY boards 0/4/8 (all X); macro-draw closes all 9 (X 1/3/8, O 5/6, drawn 0/2/4/7, no macro line); 'neither' game reaches subwinners [1,1,3,-,3,-,-,3,-] with winner 0, O to move, forced board 6 — pinning that drawn boards kill macro lines. Hand-crafted scripts pin the sent-board rule, free choice on closed target (both via won board and via cell pointing at it), won-board freeze, replay first-illegal index for occupied-cell AND sent-board violations.
